summary: Privacy and surface cleanup before broader public release. Real client names anonymized, Abyss-specific skill removed from public template, variant-map simplified.

changes.rationale: Skill is specific to the Abyss data infrastructure (cockpit dashboard, Supabase, Airbyte). Lives in the Abyss extension repository, not in the public template.

changes.scope: All examples, docs, skills, manifests across the workspace template surface.
changes.rationale: Public template should never expose the names of real client brands.
Original document mentioned the private Abyss repository and the private cockpit-pack addon. Simplified to focus on template versus operator instance, no exposure of private downstream variants.
Abyss-specific release manifests (connect-cockpit related). Tracked in the Abyss extension repository.
connect-cockpit removed, disambiguates_against references swept across all sibling skills.

breaking_changes.what: Client name references in custom workflows
breaking_changes.impact: Operators or scripts that hardcoded references to specific brand slugs in earlier versions will need to update. New canonical fictional names: northsense, vitatone, peaktrek, glowco, nestra, freshbite-foods, shellbrand, skyfloat, acmeflow.

breaking_changes.what: connect-cockpit skill removed from public template
breaking_changes.impact: Public template operators no longer see this skill. Operators on the Abyss extension still have it via that repository.
